paper_metadata.subject_name: Elements of Mechanical Engineering and Workshop

subparts.text: What are the primary differences between Cast Iron and Steel in terms of compositing and properties?
What is the deference between Arc Welding& Gas Welding?
State the first law of Thermodynamic and provide an example?
Brief about simple vapor compression Refrigeration cycle.
What is COP and list of Refrigerator?
Which is more environment friendly & efficient 2 stroke engine and 4 stroke engine.
Define and explain the Poisson’s Ratio.
What do you understand by True Stress and True Strain?

questions.question_text: What is casting defect? Explain the various types of casting defects with suitable diagrams and examples.
Draw and explain various types of patterns. Discuss the electric Arc Welding suitable diagram.
Briefly explain Vapour Compression Refrigeration System with suitable examples. Draw and explain basic Structure of I.C. Engines. Draw and explain Four-stroke Spark Ignition Engine
Write the Comparison between Four Strokes and Two Strokes Engines Write the Comparison Between S.I. and C.I. Engines Write Comparison Between Otto Cycle and Diesel Cycle with suitable diagrams. 2

subparts.text: Draw and explain Rankine Cycle used in steam power plant.
What is Gas Turbine? Write Classification of Gas Turbine.
Draw and explain Joule or Brayton Cycle used in Gas Power Plant.

questions.question_text: Define the following terms Elasticity & Plasticity Hooke’s law & factor of safety Lateral & longitudinal Strains
Brief about work in a Carnot Engine and Network done by the Carnot Engine? Brief about mechanical properties of materials?
